description:
数据集去重与合并工具 - 支持从多个 JSON/JSONL 文件加载数据,基于字段组合去重,并支持自定义转换函数。功能包括:数据合并、字段去重、数据转换、两种处理模式(先加载后去重/边加载边去重),支持大数据集处理(10M+条记录)。

Dataset Deduplication & Merge Tool - Load data from multiple JSON/JSONL files, deduplicate based on field combinations, and support custom transformation functions. Features: data merging, field deduplication, data transformation, two processing modes (dedup-after-load/dedup-as-loading), large dataset support (10M+ records).

properties.title: 输入文件列表 / Input Files
properties.name: inputFiles
properties.description:
需要合并和去重的 JSON/JSONL 文件路径列表。每个文件应包含 JSON 数组或 JSONL 格式的数据。

List of JSON/JSONL file paths to merge and deduplicate. Each file should contain a JSON array or JSONL format data.

properties.title: 去重字段 / Deduplication Fields
properties.name: fields
properties.description:
用于判断重复的字段名称列表。多个字段组合判断,字段越多去重越严格。例如:['id'] 表示按 id 去重,['name','price'] 表示按 name+price 组合去重。留空则不进行去重。

List of field names for deduplication. Multiple fields are combined, more fields means stricter deduplication. Example: ['id'] for dedup by id, ['name','price'] for dedup by name+price combination. Leave empty to skip deduplication.

properties.title: 输入文件格式 / Input File Format
properties.name: inputFormat
properties.description:
输入文件的格式。JSON 表示包含数组的 JSON 文件,JSONL 表示每行一个 JSON 对象的文件。(自动检测: 根据文件扩展名 .json/.jsonl 自动识别)

Input file format. JSON means JSON file with array, JSONL means one JSON object per line. (Auto-detect: automatically recognized by .json/.jsonl file extension)

options.label: JSONL (每行一个 JSON / One JSON per line)

properties.title: 输出内容 / Output Content
properties.name: output
properties.description:
选择要输出的内容类型。'唯一项'输出去重后的数据,'重复项'输出被判定为重复的数据,'仅统计'只显示统计信息不输出数据。

Select output content type. 'Unique items' outputs deduplicated data, 'Duplicate items' outputs data judged as duplicates, 'Statistics only' shows only statistics without data output.

options.label: 唯一项(去重后的数据) / Unique Items
重复项(被去重的数据) / Duplicate Items
仅统计(不输出数据) / Statistics Only

properties.title: 处理模式 / Processing Mode
properties.name: mode
properties.description:
去重处理模式。'先加载后去重'会先加载所有数据再去重,保持原始顺序但内存占用高;'边加载边去重'在加载时就去重,内存占用低但不保证顺序。大数据集(>10万条)建议使用后者。

Deduplication processing mode. 'Dedup after load' loads all data first then deduplicates, preserves order but high memory usage; 'Dedup as loading' deduplicates during loading, low memory usage but order not guaranteed. Recommended for large datasets (>100K records).

options.label: 先加载后去重(高内存,保持顺序) / Dedup After Load
边加载边去重(低内存,不保证顺序) / Dedup As Loading

properties.title: 仅加载指定字段 / Load Specified Fields Only
properties.name: fieldsToLoad
properties.description:
(可选)仅加载指定字段以减少内存占用和提升速度。留空则加载所有字段。注意:去重字段必须包含在内。

(Optional) Load only specified fields to reduce memory usage and improve speed. Leave empty to load all fields. Note: deduplication fields must be included.

properties.title: 去重前转换函数 / Pre-Dedup Transform Function
properties.name: preDedupTransformFunction
properties.description:
去重前对数据进行自定义转换的 JavaScript 函数。函数签名为: async (items, { customInputData }) => { return items; }。可用于过滤、修改或添加字段。

JavaScript function to custom transform data before deduplication. Function signature: async (items, { customInputData }) => { return items; }. Can be used to filter, modify or add fields.

properties.title: 去重后转换函数 / Post-Dedup Transform Function
properties.name: postDedupTransformFunction
properties.description:
去重后对数据进行自定义转换的 JavaScript 函数。函数签名为: async (items, { customInputData }) => { return items; }。可用于最终数据格式化。

JavaScript function to custom transform data after deduplication. Function signature: async (items, { customInputData }) => { return items; }. Can be used for final data formatting.

properties.title: 自定义输入数据 / Custom Input Data
properties.name: customInputData
properties.description:
传递给转换函数的自定义数据对象。可在转换函数中通过 customInputData 参数访问。

Custom data object passed to transform functions. Can be accessed via customInputData parameter in transform functions.

properties.title: Null 值视为唯一 / Treat Null as Unique
properties.name: nullAsUnique
properties.description:
如果开启,去重字段的 null/undefined 值将被视为唯一值(不与其他 null 重复)。默认关闭,null 值会被判定为重复。

If enabled, null/undefined values in deduplication fields will be treated as unique (not duplicate with other nulls). Default is disabled, null values will be judged as duplicates.

properties.title: 并行加载数 / Parallel Loads
properties.name: parallelLoads
properties.description:
并行加载文件的线程数。增加此值可加快加载速度,但会增加内存占用。

Number of parallel file loading threads. Increasing this value speeds up loading but increases memory usage.

properties.title: 并行推送数 / Parallel Pushes
properties.name: parallelPushes
properties.description:
并行推送数据到输出的线程数。增加此值可加快输出速度。注意:边加载边去重模式下此值固定为 1。

Number of parallel data push threads. Increasing this value speeds up output. Note: In dedup-as-loading mode this value is fixed to 1.

properties.title: 批次大小 / Batch Size
properties.name: batchSize
properties.description:
每次处理的批次大小。大数据集建议使用较小批次(如 1000-5000)以减少内存峰值。

Batch size for each processing. For large datasets, use smaller batches (e.g., 1000-5000) to reduce memory peaks.

properties.title: 附加文件来源 / Append File Source
properties.name: appendFileSource
properties.description:
在每个数据项中添加 __fileSource__ 字段,记录该数据来自哪个文件。对转换函数和追踪数据来源有用。

Add __fileSource__ field to each data item to record which file the data came from. Useful for transform functions and tracking data source.

properties.title: 详细日志 / Verbose Log
properties.name: verboseLog
properties.description:
开启详细日志输出。大数据集可能导致日志过多,建议仅在调试时开启。

Enable detailed log output. Large datasets may cause excessive logs, recommended only for debugging.
